summary: Frontend testing for TeacherHubPro student assignment page features: per-question instructions, matching questions, inline PDF viewer, PDF answer fields. All 7 requested features tested and working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: StudentAssignment.js line 192-196: Per-question instructions render correctly in blue info box with Info icon
StudentAssignment.js line 284-307: Matching question type renders left items with dropdown selectors containing right items
StudentAssignment.js line 443-469: PDF files render in iframe instead of just download links
StudentAssignment.js line 499-554: PDF-only assignments show numbered answer fields with Add Answer button
StudentAssignment.js line 134-146: Matching question answers (object-type) validation handled correctly
StudentAssignment.js line 600: Submit button appears for PDF-only assignments
test_credentials: Student pages are public (no auth needed)
seed_data_creation: Two pre-created test assignments: token 76006fe2f3f8 (matching questions), token 348d67436aaa (PDF-only)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Student assignment pages at /assignment/{token} are public. Matching questions store answers as objects keyed by left item. PDF-only assignments use pdfAnswers state array. Both submission flows tested and working.

per_question_instructions.result: PASS - Blue info box displayed below question headers with Info icon
per_question_instructions.sample_instruction: Choose the best answer from the options below.

inline_pdf_viewer.result: PASS - PDF rendered in iframe with download link available

pdf_answer_fields.result: PASS - Numbered answer input fields with delete buttons

add_answer_button.result: PASS - Button adds new numbered answer field

matching_submission.result: PASS - Object-type answers for matching questions submitted without validation errors
